items.title: Forter Partners with Global QSR Leader to Advance Digital Fraud Prevention
items.description: Today, Forter, the Trust Platform for digital commerce, announced a global partnership with McDonald's to deliver fraud prevention and identity solutions across the quick service restaurant (QSR) leader's digital ecosystem.

items.title: KeyBanc Sees Strong U.S. Quarter for McDonald’s (MCD) Amid Choppy Industry Backdrop
items.description: McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) is included among the 15 Best S&P 500 Dividend Stocks to Buy in 2026. On January 9, KeyBanc analyst Eric Gonzalez raised McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) price target to $340 from $335 and maintained an Overweight rating on the stock. KeyBanc said Q4 2025 looked like a strong quarter for McDonald’s US. The […]
